summary:
Open access endoscopy facilitates transparency by enabling direct visualization and real-time diagnostic feedback during procedures, which enhances patient understanding. It promotes adequate patient information without restricting informed decision-making or consent processes. 

Final Answer: $\boxed{\text{No}}$
